title: Lygistum acutifolium
taxonomy: Lygistum acutifolium, also known as Bent Grass, is a type of perennial grass. It belongs to the family Poaceae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. The genus Lygistum is often classified as part of the genus Agrostis, with some sources considering them to be the same. Lygistum acutifolium is native to Europe and western Asia. It is often found growing in moist, grassy areas and along streams.
